theme_and_archetype.rationale: Enterprise dashboards demand authority, clarity, and function-first data visualization. The Crystal glassmorphism elevates the UI to a premium 'ServiceNow/Freshservice' tier, avoiding flat generic cards.

headings.style: Clean, structured, geometric. Tracking-tight for large headings.

body.style: Sterile, objective, highly readable for dense data tables.

primary.description: Enterprise trust blue. Use sparingly for primary CTAs and active states.

background.description: Deepest midnight for dark mode to support glowing glassmorphism; stark tinted grey for light mode.

surface.description: Crystal glassmorphism for cards, sidebars, and modals. Must have 1px inner border to pop.

spacing_scale.internal_padding: p-6 or p-8 (Crucial for glassmorphic cards to breathe)

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 sticky top-0 h-screen transition-all duration-300 glassmorphism-surface

component_strategy.cards: Do not use standard flat Shadcn Cards. Override Shadcn Card background with the Surface Crystal utility defined in the color_palette.
component_strategy.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Dense styling. Header background transparent. Row hover should be bg-slate-100/50 (light) or bg-white/5 (dark). Text must be text-sm.
component_strategy.buttons: Shadcn standard buttons, but add hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95 transition-transform.
component_strategy.charts: Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts). Color arrays must match primary + status colors. Do not use random D3 libraries for standard admin charts.
component_strategy.inputs: Shadcn inputs. Focus state must be: focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-1.

animations.micro_interactions: All buttons and table rows must have transition-colors duration-200. Hover states must explicitly define both bg and text.
animations.page_load: Framer Motion staggered fade-in for dashboard widgets (staggerChildren: 0.1).

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a sophisticated, lighter enterprise feel.

images.description: Abstract high-end glassmorphism background for dark mode login screen. Full screen cover.
Abstract high-end glassmorphism background for light mode login screen. Full screen cover.
Professional portrait for the admin user profile in the top-right header.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Always verify APCA standards on text overlaying glassmorphic backgrounds. Use text-shadow if necessary on backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='sidebar-nav-customers').

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize building the structural layout first: A responsive sidebar and a top header containing theme toggler and profile avatar.
Implement the ThemeProvider early to support light/dark toggle seamlessly.
For the UI, strictly apply the 'Crystal' glassmorphism classes to all major container cards (Dashboards, Tables, Modals).
Build the dashboard grid using the defined 'Control Room' specs (lg:grid-cols-4).
Ensure all data tables (Customers, Licenses, Products) have search/filter inputs and use the precise status badge color classes.
Do not invent fake logos; use Lucide icons (e.g., Command or Hexagon) for the app brand logo.
